text: To move from a hallway of anticipation into this vibrant, information-rich environment feels transformative. The R+D wall beckons me to contemplate the ceaseless interplay between research and development—each invention, each idea, echoing all that has come before, and all that might yet come. I am struck by a sense of wonder—caught between the curiosity of learning and the humility of not knowing what will emerge. There is promise here, alongside an invitation to reflect on the silent depths behind the relentless surface of innovation.
